ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the client */,
  "client_website" TEXT /* URL of the client's website */,
  "client_contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the client */,
  "client_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the client */,
  "client_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "client_industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic */,
  "topic_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the tweet belongs to */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the tweet belongs to */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text of the tweet */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was posted */,
  "num_replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the tweet */,
  "num_retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets of the tweet */,
  "num_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes of the tweet */,
  "tweet_url" TEXT /* URL of the tweet on Twitter */,
  "tweet_language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "tweet_location" TEXT /* Location from where the tweet was posted */,
  "tweet_source" TEXT /* Source of the tweet */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "original_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original tweet if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "is_sensitive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tweet contains sensitive content */,
  "is_promoted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tweet is a promoted tweet */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* JSON array of hashtags used in the tweet */,
  "mentions" TEXT /* JSON array of user mentions in the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the analysis belongs to */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity of the tweet (range: -1 to 1) */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity of the tweet (range: 0 to 1) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Label of the sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the metric belongs to */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  "num_tweets" INTEGER /* Number of tweets posted by the client on the given date */,
  "avg_replies" REAL /* Average number of replies to tweets posted by the client on the given date */,
  "avg_retweets" REAL /* Average number of retweets of tweets posted by the client on the given date */,
  "avg_likes" REAL /* Average number of likes of tweets posted by the client on the given date */,
  "total_reach" INTEGER /* Total reach of the tweets */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate calculated as (num_replies + num_retweets + num_likes) / num_tweets */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions for the tweets */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on links in the tweets */,
  "top_topics" TEXT /* JSON array of top topics for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_metrics_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, admin) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Active or inactive status of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_hashtags" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client using the hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Hashtag used by the client */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the hashtag started being used */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the hashtag stopped being used */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the hashtag is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_hashtags_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)
